title: Fidjay's nuclear bomb
description: This mod adds mini nuclear bomb, nuclear missile and ballistic missile to the minecraft.
body:
This mod add laptop and nuclear bombs. 

You can launch a nuclear bomb anywhere if you have a laptop. Right-click on the laptop, paste the desired coordinates and insert a bomb or rocket into the cell, then click "LAUNCH". As soon as you press "LAUNCH" the rocket that you inserted into the cell will fly to the entered coordinates. A mini nuclear bomb explodes with a force of 40 tnt, a nuclear missile with a force of 127 tnt, and a ballistic missile with a force of 80 tnt.

![showcase](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae7c0b9908bac8873d8bc24fd7f2da9c54c05bcd.png)


Created with MCreator.
